SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

Class NetworkAllocationOptimizer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain.NetworkAllocationOptimizer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class NetworkAllocationOptimizer extends Object implements Serializable
Allocates a fixed shared total across competing legs to maximise a coupled objective.

Many production problems are allocation problems: split a fixed gas-lift budget across wells, apportion a plateau rate across fields sharing a host, or divide duty across parallel trains that feed shared compression. A naive parameter sweep scales poorly with the number of legs; this class treats allocation as a constrained optimization that conserves the shared total exactly.

The objective is supplied by a functional NetworkAllocationOptimizer.AllocationEvaluator that scores a candidate split (typically by setting per-leg rates on a coupled ProcessModel, running it to convergence and pricing the result with ValueChainObjective). The optimizer uses a transfer-based pattern search: it repeatedly moves a shrinking quantity between pairs of legs, accepting any move that improves the objective while respecting per-leg bounds. Because every accepted move transfers from one leg to another, the sum of the allocation is preserved at the configured total throughout.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Constructor Details

    • NetworkAllocationOptimizer

      public NetworkAllocationOptimizer(double total, int nLegs)
      Creates a network allocation optimizer with default per-leg bounds of [0, total].
      Parameters:
      total - the fixed shared total to allocate (must be positive)
      nLegs - the number of legs (must be at least 2)

  • Method Details

    • setBounds

      public NetworkAllocationOptimizer setBounds(int leg, double lower, double upper)
      Sets the lower and upper bound for one leg.
      Parameters:
      leg - the leg index (0-based)
      lower - the lower bound (non-negative)
      upper - the upper bound (greater than or equal to the lower bound)
      Returns:
      this optimizer for method chaining

    • setInitialAllocation

      public NetworkAllocationOptimizer setInitialAllocation(double[] allocation)
      Sets the initial allocation used to seed the search.
      Parameters:
      allocation - the initial per-leg allocation (length must equal the leg count)
      Returns:
      this optimizer for method chaining

    • setMaxIterations

      public NetworkAllocationOptimizer setMaxIterations(int maxIterations)
      Sets the maximum number of pattern-search iterations.
      Parameters:
      maxIterations - the maximum number of iterations (must be positive)
      Returns:
      this optimizer for method chaining

    • setInitialStepFraction

      public NetworkAllocationOptimizer setInitialStepFraction(double fraction)
      Sets the initial transfer step as a fraction of the total.
      Parameters:
      fraction - the initial step fraction in the range (0, 1]
      Returns:
      this optimizer for method chaining

    • setTolerance

      public NetworkAllocationOptimizer setTolerance(double tolerance)
      Sets the relative convergence tolerance on the transfer step.
      Parameters:
      tolerance - the relative tolerance (must be positive)
      Returns:
      this optimizer for method chaining

    • optimize

      public NetworkAllocationOptimizer.AllocationResult optimize(NetworkAllocationOptimizer.AllocationEvaluator evaluator)
      Optimizes the allocation of the shared total to maximise the evaluator's objective.
      Parameters:
      evaluator - the functional evaluator scoring candidate allocations (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the best feasible allocation found and its objective value

    • seedAllocation

      private double[] seedAllocation()
      Builds the seed allocation, honouring bounds and the configured total.
      Returns:
      a feasible-as-possible initial allocation summing to the total
